/usr/bin/c++  -g -O0 -DDEBUG CMakeFiles/tello.dir/main/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tello.dir/src/base_socket.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tello.dir/src/command_socket.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tello.dir/src/command_terminal.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tello.dir/src/config_handler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tello.dir/src/state_socket.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tello.dir/src/tello.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tello.dir/src/video_socket.cpp.o -o tello  -Wl,-rpath,/home/roey/tello/build /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libopencv_highgui.so.4.5.4d /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libopencv_video.so.4.5.4d libh264decoder.so libutils.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libopencv_videoio.so.4.5.4d /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libopencv_imgcodecs.so.4.5.4d /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libopencv_calib3d.so.4.5.4d /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libopencv_features2d.so.4.5.4d /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libopencv_flann.so.4.5.4d /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libopencv_dnn.so.4.5.4d /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libopencv_imgproc.so.4.5.4d /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libopencv_core.so.4.5.4d -lavcodec -lavutil -lswscale
